description_en: Xi'an may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 1 halal restaurants and 13 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Xi'an, China, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Xi'an: 1 halal restaurants listed, 13 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
